'''Paqwepori''' was a [[Sector/Legends|sector]] of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] located in a small [[Star cluster/Legends|cluster of stars]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] near the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]]. It became a popular trading stop for [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] pushing into regions beyond the extent of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] centuries before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], driven by tales of bazaars and the antics of shopkeepers on [[Paqwepor Major]].<ref name="TEA" />

The Paqwepori region contained almost ninety settled [[Star system/Legends|systems]].<ref name="TEA" />
